author: tmiychao
content:
<@&857649635274915900> Folks, just a reminder about our informal Office Hours hangout at 3PM UTC (<t:1782918000:t>)! We don't have a guest today but we can still use the slot to meet and chat. Join us if you have any questions, want to discuss something or just get to know each other. 

It's important time to narrow down focus on your project so use the opportunity to best way you can!

author: tmiychao
content:
Starting in a minute! https://meet.ethereum.org/epf-office-hours
Because it's more ad hoc/informal setting, I am not planning to record this one but if something important comes up, will share it afterwards
